title: psychotria goetzei var. goetzei
intro: Psychotria goetzei var. goetzei, also known as the African Psychotria, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Psychotria goetzei var. goetzei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to create infusions, decoctions, or extracts that are traditionally used in African folk medicine for various health issues.
